analysis_result: S462TY xenografts: sonidegib median survival 78 days vs vehicle 45 days (difference 33 days)
discrepancy_analysis: Exact match between reported and model results. Both report median survival of 78 days for sonidegib-treated S462TY xenografts and 45 days for vehicle-treated controls, derived from MOESM10 Fig 5l source data (n=5 per arm).
